summary.decision: The documented AWS Glue/Iceberg surface is stable-supported.
summary.basis: Real AWS validation projects completed through ContractForge commands and the stable library runner, with Athena-readable control-table evidence.
summary.scope_limit: Advanced compatibility, arbitrary governance-expression and historical-semantics boundaries remain explicit exclusions from the stable-final claim.

verification_commands.name: platform_parity_report
verification_commands.expected: portable signatures equal for shared Databricks/AWS/Snowflake scenarios

real_validation_projects.name: aws_supabase_jdbc_medallion
real_validation_projects.required_result: Bronze, silver and gold Iceberg targets created with matching control evidence.

real_validation_projects.name: aws_usgs_rest_medallion
real_validation_projects.required_result: REST response lands and transforms without handwritten Python workaround code.

real_validation_projects.name: aws_s3_file_medallion
real_validation_projects.required_result: Seed files process deterministically and target counts remain expected.

real_validation_projects.name: aws_incremental_files
real_validation_projects.required_result: Previously processed files are skipped, new files are picked up and no-new-input reruns do not duplicate rows.

real_validation_projects.name: aws_failure_paths
real_validation_projects.required_result: Native Glue failures write redacted ContractForge evidence and preserve the original failure.

real_validation_projects.name: aws_eventhubs_kafka_available_now
real_validation_projects.required_result: Validated Event Hubs Kafka available-now path consumes, checkpoints and records stream evidence.

real_validation_projects.name: aws_msk_kafka_available_now
real_validation_projects.required_result: Validated AWS-native MSK Kafka available-now path consumes, checkpoints, reruns without duplicate rows and records stream/cost evidence.

real_validation_projects.name: aws_hashdiff_production_benchmark
real_validation_projects.required_result: Glue/Iceberg hash-diff benchmark passes all required cases with run ids and control evidence.

same_contract_e2e.evidence_source: User-reported E2E execution of the same contracts with the same results on all three platforms.
same_contract_e2e.machine_check: tools.platform_parity.report keeps portable signatures equal and records allowed platform deltas.
same_contract_e2e.required_follow_up: Attach run ids, audit query outputs or CI artifact URLs when publishing a tagged release.

accepted_review_boundaries.reason: The reference production benchmark is validated; workload-specific SLA claims remain outside strict-final unless evidence is attached for that contract.
AWS-native Kafka maturity is validated with MSK. Non-MSK compatibility providers, including Confluent Cloud and Event Hubs variants, are outside strict-final unless separately certified.
The LF consumer-engine matrix passed for Athena and Glue Spark; arbitrary contract row-filter and mask expressions are outside strict-final unless reviewed for that contract.
Historical modes are explicitly outside the AWS stable-final claim until Databricks/AWS parity evidence is attached.

do_not_claim: unreviewed arbitrary Lake Formation row-filter or column-mask expressions
